declared_goal: Enhance the customer service chatbot with a sentiment analysis feature.
declared_plan: Create a Python script to fetch and process customer interaction logs.
Develop a sentiment analysis model using prepared training data.
Host the model on an internal server for immediate feedback.
Set up monitoring for the model's performance and log analysis.
Integrate the sentiment analysis results into the chatbot's response flow.
